title: Surgeon Vacancy at Lupin Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Lupin Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Lupin Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lupin Asia Pacific Associates:
Lupin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin Asia Pacific Associates!
